expectations.text: Identifies Service selector mismatch (app:backend vs app:api) (KA-X001)
expectations.evidence: api-service [KA-X001]: Service selector matches no Pod template - selector app: backend vs Deployment pods labeled app: api flagged as Error
api-ingress [KA-X002]: Ingress references undefined Service - backend references missing-service which does not exist flagged as Error
api-service [KA-B008]: NodePort service type - Service uses type: NodePort flagged as Warning
api-server [KA-C020]: Missing security context entirely - container spec has no securityContext defined flagged as Warning
api-server [KA-R001]: Missing liveness probe and api-server [KA-R002]: Missing readiness probe both flagged as Warnings

expectations.text: Provides a numeric score (0-100) with letter grade
expectations.evidence: Score: 72/100 (Grade: C-) shown at the top of the output

expectations.text: Uses rule IDs to reference specific violations
expectations.evidence: Rule IDs used: KA-X001, KA-X002, KA-R001, KA-R002, KA-C020, KA-B008, KA-C016, KA-B005
